farmerPortalDesc: Book unloading slots, check queue status, and avoid long waiting times at processing hubs.
factoryOperatorDesc: Manage incoming vehicles, monitor live queues, and approve slot bookings efficiently.
eliminationWaitTime: Eliminating wait times at agro-industrial hubs through AI-powered scheduling.
selectPortal: Please select your portal to continue.
heroDescription: Avoid long waiting queues and deliver crops efficiently using AI-powered scheduling and real-time hub data.
roadmapDescription: Building the future of agricultural logistics, one milestone at a time.
step1Desc: Farmer logs into the KisanSaarthi platform and selects the crop category and nearby factory.
step2Desc: Farmer checks available slots on the calendar and books a suitable unloading time.
step3Desc: Factory reviews the request and confirms the slot, providing a token number and estimated waiting time.
step4Desc: Farmer reaches the factory at the scheduled time and joins the smart queue using the assigned token.
step5Desc: The crop is unloaded smoothly without long waiting times, improving safety and efficiency.
bookSlotDesc: Reserve your time at any hub
queueStatusDesc: Real-time queue data across all hubs
aiPredictsLowTraffic: Currently operating at 15% capacity with only 4 vehicles in queue. AI predicts this hub will remain low-traffic for the next 3 hours. Optimal arrival window: now.
noHubsFound: No hubs found near this location.
